2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>

   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

The right hand continues to vigorously whisk the pale yellow mixture inside the bowl. The left hand holds the pot aloft near the dark wooden cabinets. A plate of fruit tarts remains visible on the right side.</think><answer></answer>

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

[4-6] Medium shot excludes equipment; the floral-dress woman gestures with open hands as a blue/white graphic appears. The woman in the floral dress keeps hands clasped on

[124-128] The man finishes pouring a pale yellow liquid from a large white bowl into a stainless steel pot on the stovetop. He immediately begins whisking the mixture vigorously with a metal whisk while holding the empty white bowl in his left hand. Two green limes sit on a wooden cutting board to the left near a pie crust. [128-132] The camera cuts to a wide shot revealing the man in a light blue shirt standing at a kitchen island. He continues to whisk the pot's contents while looking down at it. The surrounding counter displays various prepared dishes, including pies and salads, along with the pie crust and limes.

[132-140] A man lifts a stainless steel pot and pours a thick, pale green mixture into a brown, crumbly pie crust set in a metal tin on a wooden board. A metal whisk stays inside the pot as the filling flows steadily. Two whole green limes sit on the cutting board to the left. The liquid accumulates at the bottom, spreading across the base of the crust. The camera provides a close-up view of the pot tilting, showing the viscous green liquid pouring out while the whisk remains submerged. The mixture fills the center of the crust continuously throughout the sequence.

[140-148] Thick, pale green liquid continues pouring steadily from a stainless steel pot into a brown, crumbly pie crust. The viscous mixture accumulates in the center, rising within the metal tin and spreading across the base. A metal whisk remains inside the pot as the container tilts further to empty, causing the stream to thin slightly. Two green limes sit stationary on the wooden cutting board to the left throughout the sequence.

[148-150] The man tilts a stainless steel pot further, pouring the remaining thick, pale green liquid into the brown pie crust as the stream thins. [150-152] He tilts the pot back to an upright position, ceasing the flow while holding it steady above the wooden cutting board. [152-156] Using a whisk, he scrapes the inside of the pot to guide the remaining filling into the metal tin. Two green limes sit on the board next to the pie, and RealLime boxes are visible on the counter.

[122-124] The man tilts the large white bowl further, pouring the pale yellow liquid mixture into the stainless steel pot. His right hand holds the metal whisk inside the bowl as the liquid flows out, while his left hand supports the rim to guide the transfer.

[156-158] The man in the light blue shirt sets the stainless steel pot on the counter after scraping the filling. He stands behind the wooden board with the filled crust and two green limes, gesturing with open hands against a background of dark wooden cabinets.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

queries.question: How many times did the man wearing a light blue button-down shirt gesture with both hands?

samples.output: <think>The man in the light blue shirt changes his hand gestures, raising his right hand with fingers curled while his left hand remains lower with palm facing down. He stands behind the counter where the filled pie crust rests on the black stovetop, flanked by a wooden board with limes and various food displays.</think><answer></answer>

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

queries.question: How many times did the man wearing a light blue button-down shirt gesture with both hands?

samples.output: <think>The man in the light blue shirt raises his right hand with an open palm while speaking. He holds the white mixing bowl in his left hand. He looks forward, then briefly glances down at the bowl before looking up again.</think><answer></answer>

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening title to the hosts beginning their discussion, noting specific actions and graphics.

answers.text: The video opens with "The Balancing Act" title card featuring a pink speech bubble. At two seconds, the scene shifts to a studio where two women in red dresses sit at a glass table. By six seconds, a lower-third graphic slides in to identify hosts Olga Villaverde and Amber Milt. As the banner fades around eight seconds, the woman in the floral dress gestures with both hands near her torso while engaging her co-host in conversation.

From 14 to 22 seconds, the woman in the solid red dress transitions from clasping her hands to gesturing outward, then resting them in her lap. Simultaneously, the woman in the floral dress turns forward, smiles, and raises her right index finger while speaking. At 24 seconds, the scene abruptly cuts to a red graphic displaying green and yellow speech bubbles containing a dollar sign and a paw print, removing the studio setting from view.

From 26 to 28 seconds, the graphic sequence evolves as the initial icons vanish. A red speech bubble featuring a white apple outline with clock hands appears alongside a teal bubble displaying a white DNA double helix. Finally, the teal bubble disappears, and white text reading "QUICK BYTES" materializes to the right of the apple icon against the solid red background, concluding the visual transition.

From 28 to 30 seconds, the static red "QUICK BYTES" background persists while a circular frame emerges, showing a man in a white shirt mixing bowl contents. Simultaneously, the word "WITH" and a handwritten signature appear below the main title. Between 30 and 32 seconds, this cooking graphic transitions to a new screen featuring a large dark blue speech bubble logo with a pink inner circle. Behind this logo, faint blue "Balancing Act" text becomes visible against a light blue gradient background.

From 32 to 42 seconds, the video displays a static red background featuring a white apple-clock icon and "QUICK BYTES" text alongside a circular frame. At 42 seconds, the scene shifts to a kitchen environment with dark wooden cabinetry and a stainless steel refrigerator. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, separating his hands from a prayer-like position to gesture with open palms near his waist as the hosts begin their discussion.

From 44 to 56 seconds, the man in the light blue shirt stands behind a marble kitchen island with dark wood cabinetry. At 56 seconds, the scene cuts to a close-up of mini tarts featuring golden crusts and toasted meringue peaks, with limes and mint in the background. Between 58 and 60 seconds, a cross-fade transition replaces these with a white platter of assorted fruit tarts topped with whipped cream, raspberries, blueberries, and lime slices, set against blurred dark wooden cabinetry.

He then stands behind the counter chewing, facing forward, surrounded by displayed desserts including lime bars and pies on the marble surface.</think><answer></answer>

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

[124-128] The man finishes pouring a pale yellow liquid from a large white bowl into a stainless steel pot on the stovetop. He immediately begins whisking the mixture vigorously with a metal whisk while holding the empty white bowl in his left hand. Two green limes sit on a wooden cutting board to the left near a pie crust. [128-132] The camera cuts to a wide shot revealing the man in a light blue shirt standing at a kitchen island. He continues to whisk the pot's contents while looking down at it. The surrounding counter displays various prepared dishes, including pies and salads, along with the pie crust and limes.

[132-140] A man lifts a stainless steel pot and pours a thick, pale green mixture into a brown, crumbly pie crust set in a metal tin on a wooden board. A metal whisk stays inside the pot as the filling flows steadily. Two whole green limes sit on the cutting board to the left. The liquid accumulates at the bottom, spreading across the base of the crust. The camera provides a close-up view of the pot tilting, showing the viscous green liquid pouring out while the whisk remains submerged. The mixture fills the center of the crust continuously throughout the sequence.

[140-148] Thick, pale green liquid continues pouring steadily from a stainless steel pot into a brown, crumbly pie crust. The viscous mixture accumulates in the center, rising within the metal tin and spreading across the base. A metal whisk remains inside the pot as the container tilts further to empty, causing the stream to thin slightly. Two green limes sit stationary on the wooden cutting board to the left throughout the sequence.

[148-150] The man tilts a stainless steel pot further, pouring the remaining thick, pale green liquid into the brown pie crust as the stream thins. [150-152] He tilts the pot back to an upright position, ceasing the flow while holding it steady above the wooden cutting board. [152-156] Using a whisk, he scrapes the inside of the pot to guide the remaining filling into the metal tin. Two green limes sit on the board next to the pie, and RealLime boxes are visible on the counter.

queries.question: What action is the person wearing a white long-sleeved shirt performing with the metal whisk?

answers.text: Whisking yellow liquid
